title: urtica gracilis subsp. gracilis
intro: Urtica gracilis subsp. gracilis, also known as the slender nettle or Japanese nettle, is a subspecies of nettle native to East Asia and Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, offering several health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Urtica gracilis subsp. gracilis can be prepared into various herbal products, including tea, infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
